items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC2 Available
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 RC2 is now available.

This update improves network scanning reliability and fixes a crash that could occur for some users after flashing Mr. Fusion on Windows.

Network scanning has been made more reliable with adjusted timeouts, and a new Re-Scan button has been added to easily scan again for MiSTer devices.

A fix has also been implemented for a crash that could occur after flashing to an SD card, by adding a short delay before restoring Windows settings in Flash Mr. Fusion.

You can download the latest release candidate below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
